global_auth_state_block.identified_role: global desktop-auth / gameSSO auth-state structure that owns the async response pointer, cached OAuth/JX fields, and the scheduler-owned play-launch gate

key_fields.role: active async response / request object pointer consumed by the per-state handlers
scheduler deadline / next auth check timestamp

supporting_observations: 0x140009ED0 passes rcx = 0x140E58A70 into 0x140299A90, proving that the auth/result layout begins at 0x140E58A70 rather than at an isolated scalar state slot.
The later state machine, token parser, and Bearer-launch helpers all access contiguous fields rooted at 0x140E58A70, including the response pointer at 0x140E58A78 and the play gate at 0x140E58B98.

scheduler_branch.identified_role: post-login auth continuation scheduler that decides between direct game-session launch, shield/oauth maintenance, and deferred Bearer play launch

decision_flow.effect: returns without launching a new auth/network sub-stage
calls 0x140026530(..., 0x0A) and takes the failure/abort path
calls 0x14029AD20 and then returns with client state +0x10 set to 0x122
decision_flow.best_current_reading: the cached session/character prerequisites for the game-session launch path are already satisfied

decision_flow.effect: writes 1 to 0x140E58B98 at 0x140156A17 before taking the shield/oauth maintenance sub-branch
calls 0x14029A3D0 and returns with client state +0x10 set to 0x122
calls 0x14029A0D0 and returns with client state +0x10 set to 0x122
calls 0x140299FB0 and returns with client state +0x10 set to 0x122
decision_flow.best_current_reading: check_token / ready-to-continue path that may tail-jump into the Bearer play request when the cached token gate is satisfied

scheduler_branch.key_observation: The non-zero play-launch gate is scheduler-owned: 0x140156A17 is the only confirmed non-zero writer for 0x140E58B98, and that write happens before the shield/oauth deadline branch rather than inside the later Bearer game-session builder.

global_dispatcher.identified_role: top-level auth-state dispatcher for the global desktop-auth/gameSSO workflow

state_map.best_current_name: OAuth/check-token response parser with optional tail continuation into 0x140299FB0

global_dispatcher.state_4_observation: When state 4 sees an accepted response-object kind at 0x140E58A78[0], it clears both 0x140E58A70 and 0x140E58A78 and frees the old object.

0x14029A640.identified_role: success/error handler that clears state 1, parses an absolute-expiry style field, and then decides whether to refresh immediately or re-enter the play-gate path
proven_effects: Clears 0x140E58A70 to 0 near the top of the handler.
On HTTP 200, looks up the literal key exp and stores the parsed value directly into 0x140E58AD0.
On HTTP 0x190, computes a time-derived fallback value for 0x140E58AD0.
Frees and clears 0x140E58A78 before choosing between 0x14029A0D0 and 0x140299FB0 based on the refreshed deadline.

0x14029BDA0.identified_role: shared token/check-token response parser for states 2 and 3
proven_effects: On HTTP 200, parses access_token and stores it to 0x140E58AA0.
Parses refresh_token and stores it to 0x140E58AB8.
Parses expires_in, adds it to the current time, and stores the resulting deadline to 0x140E58AD0.
State 3 can continue into 0x140299FB0 after the parser returns if the dispatcher still observes the expected state.
0x14029BDA0.note: The adjacent literals belong to the same auth string cluster and nearby builders, but only access_token, refresh_token, and expires_in are directly proven as consumed in the shown state-2/state-3 parser excerpt.

proven_effects: Builds the game-session request stage after the scheduler sees the session/character prerequisites as ready.
Sets the global auth state at 0x140E58A70 to 5.
Writes esi into 0x140E58B98, but esi is zero-initialized on this path, so this store is a clear/reset and not the upstream non-zero source of the play-launch gate.
On HTTP 200, first verifies that the response metadata at response_object + 0xB8 matches application/json.
Parses a token field from the JSON-shaped response path before copying derived string data into the status/message area rooted at 0x140E58A80.
Also updates the companion status/error field at 0x140E58A98 along success/error branches.
Clears the active response pointer at 0x140E58A78 and eventually returns the global state at 0x140E58A70 to 0.

updated_conclusion: The login continuation no longer looks like a loose collection of helpers. It is a concrete global auth scheduler rooted at 0x140E58A70: the scheduler branch at 0x14015699B primes the one-shot play-launch gate, state 2/3 parse shield/oauth token material into the JX cache, state 1 maintains the absolute next-check deadline, and state 5 handles the terminal Bearer public/v1/games/.../play response.
next_targets: Decode 0x140156AB0 so the scheduler's 0x19F60 == 0x23 side branch is named rather than left as an opaque escape path.
Trace 0x14029A3D0 and 0x14029A0D0 to separate the cold-start check_token launch path from the expired-token refresh path with exact endpoint builders.
Continue naming the third 0x1401303A0 caller rooted at 0x14013098F so the shared display-name sink is tied to a concrete subsystem instead of remaining an anonymous local parser.
